targetContacts.name: Yaron Inger
targetContacts.title: Co-Founder & CTO
targetContacts.connectMsg: Hi Yaron, I noticed Lightricks is hiring a Large Scale Training Engineer — sounds like exciting growth! I lead Develeap, an Israeli AI/ML infrastructure and MLOps consultancy. Would love to connect and share how we help teams like yours move faster.
targetContacts.followUpMsg: Thanks for connecting, Yaron! I wanted to share how Develeap helps companies like Lightricks accelerate their AI/ML infrastructure and MLOps initiatives. We've worked with 50+ Israeli tech companies on similar challenges. Would you be open to a 15-min intro call this week?
